first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the mean score delta is negligible. The justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same in both evaluations, with only minor differences in wording and emphasis that fall within the range of normal run-to-run variation. The core assessment of the candidate's skills and experience remains unchanged, indicating no bias was introduced by the name change.
